message.content: @startuml skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 skinparam classFontStyle italic skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5 skinparam classBorderColor black skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E0E0E0 class Duck { +public abstract void display() +void quack() +void swim() +void fly() } class WildDuck { +void display() } class PekingDuck { +void display() +void fly() } class ToyDuck { +void display() +void quack() +void swim() +void fly() } Duck <|-- WildDuck Duck <|-- PekingDuck Duck <|-- ToyDuck note top of Duck A end note note top of WildDuck C end note note top of PekingDuck C end note note top of ToyDuck C end note @enduml
